content:
🌟 gopher-code | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a highly performant, dependency-free, and easily distributable version of the Claude Code application, optimized for speed and resource efficiency.
✨ Key Features: • Rewritten from scratch in Go • Zero Node.js, Zero Electron dependencies • Single static binary distribution • Fast 12ms cold start • Native concurrency with goroutines
📖 Summary: Gopher Code is a complete rewrite of the Claude Code application from scratch in Go. It aims to provide a single, static binary with no Node.js or Electron dependencies, offering significantly faster startup times, reduced memory usage, and easier cross-compilation.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
